channel.title: GitHub Svelte Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: taikoxyz/taiko-mono
item.description: Taiko's Alethia based rollup protocol 🥁 🌸

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: matt8707/ha-fusion
item.description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard

item.title: threlte/threlte
item.description: 3D framework for Svelte

item.title: huntabyte/shadcn-svelte
item.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

item.title: primocms/primo
item.description: Primo is a visual CMS with a built-in code editor, Svelte blocks, and static site generator.

item.title: gurucomputing/headscale-ui
item.description: A web frontend for the headscale Tailscale-compatible coordination server

item.title: vkurko/calendar
item.description: Full-sized drag & drop JavaScript event calendar with resource & timeline views

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS

item.title: marcusolsson/obsidian-projects
item.description: Plain text project planning in Obsidian

item.title: ChurchApps/FreeShow
item.description: FreeShow is a free and open-source, user-friendly presenter software.

item.title: appwrite/website
item.description: The Appwrite website, docs and blog 🏠

item.title: SOH69/mm_radio
item.description: A Radio Script for Fivem Server

item.title: face-hh/lyntr
item.description: Micro-blogging social media - with an IQ test. https://lyntr.com

item.title: ThaUnknown/miru
item.description: Bittorrent streaming software for cats. Stream anime torrents, real-time with no waiting for downloads.

item.title: nmelhado/league-page
item.description: Create a custom league page for your Sleeper fantasy football league!

item.title: dora-team/dora.dev
item.description: Public-facing knowledge site: https://dora.dev

item.title: wobsoriano/svelte-sonner
item.description: An opinionated toast component for Svelte. A port of @emilkowalski's sonner.

item.title: skeletonlabs/skeleton
item.description: An adaptive design system and component solution built around Tailwind.
